# AXL (gene of interest) boxplot

```{r axl-boxplot}
plot_goi_boxplot(
  malignant_list  = TARGET.malignant,
  gene            = GENE_OF_INT,
  dataset_label   = TARGET_DATASET,
  dataset_short   = DATASET_SHORT,
  output_dir      = WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR,
  malignant_label = "H&N Cancer",
  top_pairs_to_label = BOXPLOT_TOP_PAIRS_TO_LABEL,
  plot_width         = BOXPLOT_WIDTH,
  plot_height        = BOXPLOT_HEIGHT
)
```
